name: manok-bot-2026
description: MANOK Bot 2026 - premium Discord bot platform with security, music, Lua tools, and dashboard.

scripts.dev:infra: docker compose up -d mongo redis lavalink
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @manok/shared && npm run build --workspace @manok/database && npm run build --workspace @manok/bot && npm run build --workspace @manok/dashboard
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @manok/shared && npm run build --workspace @manok/database && npm run typecheck --workspace @manok/bot && npm run typecheck --workspace @manok/dashboard
